reason: Verified agent can use GitHub tool to fetch authenticated user information after granting account access.
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully with agent list in sidebar.
Clicked on agent "QA-20260417-211814-yj1e" in sidebar — Agent detail page opened.
Verified agent status is "idle" — Status indicator showed "idle" before sending message.
Sent message "Use the GitHub tool to check who I am. Tell me my GitHub username." — Message was entered and sent successfully; agent status changed to "working".
GitHub account access card appeared — Card displayed "Allow access to GitHub to look up the authenticated username?" with GitHub account already selected.
Clicked "Allow Access (1)" button — Access was granted and agent resumed processing.
API request review dialog appeared — Dialog asked to allow "GET /user" GitHub API call.
Clicked "Allow Once" — Permission granted and agent completed processing.
Verified response includes GitHub username — Agent responded with "Your GitHub username is yiw190." — Screenshot captured showing complete interaction.
